title: 10 possible side effects of Rhodiola rosea (Rhodiola) if used improperly
intro: Rhodiola rosea, a plant used in traditional medicine, can have negative health consequences if used improperly. Overuse or misuse of Rhodiola rosea can lead to symptoms such as dry mouth, irritability, insomnia, and excessive salivation. In severe cases, it may cause symptoms consistent with serotonin syndrome, such as agitation, rapid heart rate, and high blood pressure. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, including antidepressants, leading to increased risk of serotonin syndrome. Pregnant or breastfeeding women should avoid using Rhodiola rosea due to a lack of safety data. As with any substance, it's important to consult with a healthcare professional before starting to use Rhodiola rosea to ensure proper use and minimize the risk of adverse effects.
